School Cleaning Services in New York City

CDC-compliant janitorial for K-12 schools, charter schools, and daycare centers. MBE-certified, Green Seal products, and every session verified through JaniTrack.

Schedule a Free Walkthrough → 347-332-9348
✓MBE / MWBE Certified
✓CDC-Compliant Protocols
✓Green Seal Products
✓Background-Checked Teams

New York City schools face unique cleaning challenges: high-traffic environments, strict health department regulations, allergy-sensitive students, and limited budgets. GreenPoint Maintenance Services Corp provides dedicated janitorial programs designed specifically for K-12 educational facilities — from single-campus charter schools to multi-building district complexes.

Every cleaning session follows CDC-recommended protocols for educational environments. We use only Green Seal certified, non-toxic products safe for classrooms where children learn, eat, and play. Our JaniTrack system gives administrators and school boards measurable proof that every surface meets clinical-grade cleanliness standards — no guesswork, no complaints, no failed inspections.

As a certified Minority Business Enterprise registered with NYC and NYS, GreenPoint qualifies for diversity procurement programs and MWBE set-aside contracts. Whether you're a charter school evaluating vendors or a district procurement officer sourcing compliant providers, we deliver the documentation, insurance, and performance standards government contracts require.

What's Included

Classroom Sanitization

Daily cleaning of desks, chairs, whiteboards, door handles, light switches, and shared surfaces. Green products eliminate pathogens without toxic fumes.

Cafeteria & Kitchen Cleaning

Deep cleaning and sanitization of food preparation areas, serving lines, tables, and floors. Health department compliance documentation included.

Restroom Disinfection

Multi-daily restroom service with ATP bioluminescence verification. Supply replenishment, fixture sanitization, and odor control.

Gymnasium & Auditorium Care

Floor maintenance, bleacher cleaning, and event turnaround service. Dust control and air quality management for large spaces.

Nurse's Office Protocols

OSHA-compliant cleaning of medical examination areas. Biohazard-safe waste handling and clinical-grade surface sanitization.

Summer Deep Clean Programs

Comprehensive floor stripping, sealing, carpet extraction, and facility-wide deep sanitization during summer break. Move-in ready for September.

Why Facility Managers Choose GreenPoint

JaniTrack Verification
Real-time photo documentation, GPS-tagged task completion, and ATP bioluminescence testing accessible through your administrator dashboard.
MBE Certified
Registered Minority Business Enterprise with NYC & NYS. Qualifies for diversity procurement programs and MWBE set-aside contracts.
Green Seal Products Only
Non-toxic, allergy-safe, EPA-registered cleaning products. No harsh chemical fumes in classrooms where children spend 8 hours a day.
Dedicated School Teams
Same background-checked, trained personnel assigned to your facility every visit. Consistency, accountability, and familiarity your staff can trust.

Frequently Asked Questions

We exclusively use Green Seal certified, EPA-registered products that are non-toxic, allergy-safe, and free from harsh chemical fumes. All products meet NYC Department of Education and Department of Health standards for use in school environments.

Yes. Every GreenPoint school cleaning protocol is built on current CDC recommendations for K-12 environments, including high-touch surface sanitization, proper ventilation practices, and documented disinfection procedures.

Through JaniTrack — our proprietary system that provides timestamped GPS-tagged photos, completed task checklists, and ATP bioluminescence testing. Administrators access everything through a live dashboard.

Yes. GreenPoint is MBE/MWBE certified with NYC and NYS, and SAM.gov registered with a valid CAGE code and UEI. We qualify for diversity procurement programs and set-aside contracts at every government level.

Pricing is customized based on square footage, classrooms, frequency, and scope. We provide fixed-price proposals with no hidden fees after a free walkthrough. Try our instant quote calculator for an estimate in under 60 seconds.

Absolutely. We offer flexible after-hours, evening, weekend, and holiday scheduling. Our teams work around your academic calendar, including early-morning pre-school arrival cleaning and event turnaround service.

Get a Free School Cleaning Assessment

We'll walk your facility, identify compliance gaps, and deliver a fixed-price proposal within 48 hours. No obligation. MBE-certified.
